## What & why

A sentence on the change and the user-visible reason.

## Checks

- [ ] If I edited `SKILL.md`, I also updated `.cursor/rules/formengine.mdc` and `.windsurf/rules/formengine.md` (if the rule changed)
- [ ] If I added an example, `validate_schema.py` passes on it
- [ ] If I added a new UI library type, I updated `references/component-types.md` and the `_TYPES` set in `validate_schema.py`
- [ ] CI is green

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you want me to look at first.
